# gen8r

> gen8r is an AI social media campaign tool for small businesses. You describe a promotion in one sentence (via Slack, Telegram, or a web brand portal), and gen8r generates a full 10-post social media campaign — captions, AI images, branded flyers, hashtags, and Reels — then auto-publishes it to Instagram and Facebook once you approve each post. Built by LiftLogic AI.

gen8r turns a one-line description of what a business is promoting into a complete, on-brand, 10-post social media campaign, and publishes it on the owner's approval. It is aimed at small businesses — yoga studios, coffee shops, restaurants, hair salons, real estate agents, travel agencies, gyms, retail — that need a consistent social presence without a marketer on staff. Nothing publishes without approval: the owner gets a daily prompt on Slack or Telegram (or uses the web brand portal) to review, edit, skip, or publish.

## Key facts

- **What it does:** Generates and auto-publishes 10-post social campaigns (captions, AI-generated images, branded flyers, hashtags, Reels) from a one-sentence prompt.
- **Where it publishes:** Instagram and Facebook today. Google Business, YouTube, Pinterest, TikTok, WhatsApp, Reddit, and LinkedIn rolling out across plans.
- **How you use it:** Slack, Telegram (t.me/Gen8rBot), or the web brand portal at app.gen8r.ai. No design or copywriting skill needed.
- **Control:** Nothing publishes without owner approval. Edit any caption, swap any image, skip any day. Cancel anytime, no contract.
- **Pricing:** Starter $29/mo, Growth $49/mo, Pro $99/mo. Early-access accounts get the first month free.
- **Who it's for:** Small businesses that promote on Instagram/Facebook — yoga studios, coffee shops, restaurants, hair salons, real estate agents, and more.
- **Parent company:** LiftLogic AI (https://liftlogic.dev).

## Primary pages

- [Home — product overview, how it works, pricing, FAQ](https://gen8r.ai/): What gen8r does, live campaign demos, pricing tiers, and sign-up.
- [Free guides hub](https://gen8r.ai/c/): Free, ready-to-post Instagram captions, Reel ideas, and 10-day plans by business type.
- [10-day social media plan for a coffee shop](https://gen8r.ai/c/10-day-social-media-plan-for-a-coffee-shop): Example day-by-day campaign.
- [Instagram captions for a yoga studio](https://gen8r.ai/c/instagram-captions-for-a-yoga-studio): Ready-to-post caption examples.
- [Instagram Reel ideas for a restaurant](https://gen8r.ai/c/instagram-reel-ideas-for-a-restaurant): Phone-shootable Reel concepts.

## Getting started

- [Start free / sign up](https://gen8r.ai/#start): Create a brand and generate a first campaign; first month free on early access.
- [Book a 30-minute call](https://calendly.com/gen8r/30min): Talk to the team.
- [Customer Telegram bot](https://t.me/Gen8rBot): Create campaigns from Telegram.

- [Privacy policy](https://gen8r.ai/privacy)
